text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Mejiro Dober invites me to an event for
making wet potpourri, a type of interior
fragrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she loves herbs, so I want to do my best to
support her efforts to create a great fragrance!
choice_data_list: Okay! Which herbs should we pick?
Okay! Which herbs should we pick?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Come on. This isn't the kind of event you need to be getting that enthusiastic about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, calm down, Trainer. You don't need to
bring that kind of enthusiasm to this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, we have been walking for
quite a while... I'd like to take a short break. You
sit down too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We've been walking for quite a while—are you
getting tired? I brought some herbal tea, so let's
take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I brought some chocolate, so you should eat
some. Don't want you passing out on me.
choice_data_list: What about the event?
What about the event?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I also have some chocolate and other snacks!
We're going to be doing a lot more walking, so
you should stock up on energy.
choice_data_list: What about the event?
What about the event?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The event runs until this evening. Let's head over
to that shaded area. Hurry up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! The event runs until this evening.
Let's rest in that shaded area. Come, this way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Won over by Mejiro Dober's rare show of
forcefulness, I accept her kind hospitality.
Afterwards, it's finally time to gather the herbs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Won over by Mejiro Dober's rare show of
forcefulness, I accept her kind hospitality.
Afterwards, it's finally time to gather the herbs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's some rosemary over there...
choice_data_list: Should we go pick some?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder, though. Rosemary would be refreshing and
revitalizing, but I feel like something would still be
lacking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe I have my priorities backwards. Yes, it's
probably better to go with a different herb...
choice_data_list: ...Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing! Anyway, we're holding off on the
rosemary for now. Let's search over there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, it's nothing. Anyway, let's put the
rosemary on hold for now. We should try over
there instead, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If we climb this cliff, I'm sure we'll find other herbs
up there!
choice_data_list: If we... wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, I need some muña! And that herb grows on
high ground.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: They're great for health and promote relaxation!
choice_data_list:
That won't help if you get hurt before you find
any!

That won't help if you get hurt before you find
any!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite telling me not to get excited about this
event, she seems strangely eager... Regardless,
we continue collecting herbs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober contacts me a few days later to let
me know that the wet potpourri is ready. I guess
she wants to show me, since I helped a little?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Here. This is the wet potpourri from the other
day.
choice_data_list: ...Huh?
...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Here. It's the wet potpourri I made the other day!
choice_data_list: ...Huh?
...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What? You don't want it? I'd like to think I did a
pretty good job with it...
choice_data_list: Huh?! I thought you made it for yourself.
Huh?! I thought you made it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Don't you want it? It smells great, and I'm
quite proud of how it turned out, actually...
choice_data_list: Huh?! I thought you made it for yourself.
Huh?! I thought you made it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, I've already got a bunch of these anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm? I don't think I remember saying that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You see... I got a call from my former trainer not
too long ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...To tell you the truth, I got a call from my former
trainer not too long ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's been so long since we've spoken! To what do I
owe this pleasure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's been so long since we've spoken! To what do I
owe this pleasure?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to see how you've been doing lately.
You're not pushing yourself too hard, are you? I
hope you're getting proper rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting plenty of rest, I assure you! I even
attended a Mejiro family tea party recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I really am doing fine... Well, I am, anyway...

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...Berry?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No, forget it! It's nothing. I'm completely fine!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text: Okay, then... Can I tell you something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: S-sure...

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You're kinder than you realize, Berry. You really
do care about others.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text:
So have more faith in that kindness. If you do, I'm
sure you'll be able to handle any challenge that
comes your way.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Former Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Keep giving it your best. I'm rooting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...R-right! Thank you very much for the call.
Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You're always worrying about me, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I know you worry about me a
lot—you're always making sure I rest properly and
whatnot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And I couldn't just sit by on the receiving end
forever...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I... I wanted to do a little something for you in
return.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back when we were collecting herbs, she was
pushing herself while telling me to take it easy... I
guess it was all for my sake...
choice_data_list: I appreciate you doing all that... for me.
I appreciate you doing all that... for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back when we were collecting herbs, she was
pushing herself while telling me to take it easy... I
guess it was all for my sake...
choice_data_list: I appreciate you doing all that... for me.
I appreciate you doing all that... for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I-I never said it was for you! It's just...
there's someone special to me I didn't want to let
down!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm the one who should be grateful to you.
Thank you for always holding me dear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Besides... we won't be winning any races unless
we're both at our best.
choice_data_list: Let's keep giving it our all!
Let's keep giving it our all!
I'll have to do something for you next.
I'll have to do something for you next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that you like it. It feels like I finally got
to return the favor somewhat.
choice_data_list: Let's keep giving it our all!
Let's keep giving it our all!
I'll have to do something for you next.
I'll have to do something for you next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I went to a lot of effort making that potpourri, so
I expect as much effort from you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm expecting great things!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You better not slack off while you're indulging in
that fragrance, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We'll ace tomorrow's training with aplomb, then
keep riding that momentum!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. If you keep doing that, there'll be no end
to this.
choice_data_list: Our relationship won't end, though, right?
Our relationship won't end, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. If you keep doing that, there'll be no end
to this.
choice_data_list: Our relationship won't end, though, right?
Our relationship won't end, though, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-wait... Um, what... What do you mean?
choice_data_list:
I'll work alongside you until I'm physically
incapable of working anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Don't use such ambiguous phrasing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ohhh! But come on, why say that now? I know that's how you've always done things!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Well, if you do want to do something in return, I
won't stop you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...You threw me for a loop there. I thought for
sure you meant...
